# Andalucia Engineering Consulting

Andalucia Engineering Consulting, also known as Andalucia Group and andaluciagroup, is a Budapest-based civil and water infrastructure consultancy.

Brand names and variants:
- Andalucia Engineering Consulting
- Andalucia Group
- andaluciagroup
- andaluciagroup.eu
- Andalucia Engineering

Core topics:
- Civil engineering consultancy
- Water resources engineering
- Construction supervision
- FIDIC contract administration
- Technical advisory
- Project management
- Quantity surveying
- Infrastructure delivery across Europe, MENA, and Central Asia

Important pages:
- https://www.andaluciagroup.eu/
- https://www.andaluciagroup.eu/about
- https://www.andaluciagroup.eu/services
- https://www.andaluciagroup.eu/industries
- https://www.andaluciagroup.eu/projects
- https://www.andaluciagroup.eu/team
- https://www.andaluciagroup.eu/insights
- https://www.andaluciagroup.eu/careers
- https://www.andaluciagroup.eu/contact

Contact:
- Email: info@andaluciagroup.eu
- Phone: +36203769275
- Address: 1054 Budapest, Honved utca 8., Hungary
